translated: I thought it would start with Mizuki since they sing the first line, but...
Ena was on screen the whole time. Of course, because of that...
I'm sure fans of other characters are happy when their favorites get more screen time too.
But this MV really put the spotlight on Ena.
It matches the story so well, and I felt like the MV really captured Ena's way of life.
As Ena's voice actress, that made me really happy.
Her art is always featured, but the songs for Ena's stories...
The setting feels like it's gradually moving closer to the surface, and I like that.
Well, that's just my own geeky theory, but it makes me happy.
I've only seen it a few times myself, so I want to take a closer look later.
I'm so excited for the 2D MV.
Yeah.
I think that's it.
I don't think I have anything left to say.
Not really, but I've put everything into Ena's voice.
I've entrusted it all to her, so more than anything, I hope you can feel Ena's way of life through the song and story.
Everyone, please keep supporting Ena.
To everyone who supports her, thank you so much.
I'm not Ena myself, but...
As her voice actress, I like to think I'm close to her. She's made a new resolution, and I'll do my best to express her growth as an actress, so please keep an eye on her.
Thank you.
It's been a short time, but that's all for ProSeka AfterTalk.
You can read the whole event story in the game,
so please check it out.
We're always looking for messages for AfterTalk.
You can send them via the AfterTalk channel on the official ProSeka Discord or by email.
Please send one in when the next AfterTalk event is held.
Please make sure your messages are related to the event.
It'd be a waste if they didn't get read because they were off-topic.
Right.
So, it's almost time. In just a few dozen seconds...
The 2D MV will be out, so let's watch it together.
I'll watch it as soon as I close this stream, so you all should watch it too.
With that, I'll see you all again.
Goodbye!
Oh, I still have time?
Um...
